Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Update session handoff with dashboard routing resolution

Documented the investigation and fix for the demo user 404 issue.
Root cause was React Query cache not being invalidated after login.
Solution was to force full page reload.

Also documented discovery that role-based dashboards were already
fully implemented with complete functionality for all persona types.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix incorrect ''Super Admin'' label for demo users

Root cause: Zustand persist middleware was caching old state in localStorage.
Users who previously opened the app had stale currentUserRole values persisted,
causing incorrect role labels to display.

Changes:
- Added version: 1 to store persistence config to invalidate old cached state
- Added fallback display for role label while loading
- Verified demo user roles are correctly assigned in database

Demo users have correct roles:
- Emily (management_manager)
- Sarah (poa_board_member)
- James (homeowner)
- Alex (poa_board_contributor)

Users should clear their browser cache or the app will auto-migrate on next load.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add known issues to session handoff for triage

Documented two issues for next session:
1. Sign out race condition - user A shows after logging in as user B
2. Homeowner role permissions - James seeing unauthorized content

Both issues have investigation checklists and priority levels.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
